steps.title: Identify the product factors
steps.content:
Area of a rectangle is length times width. The function is

$$y=(72w)(w)$$

so the two factors represent the rectangle's two side lengths.

steps.title: Interpret the larger factor
steps.content:
The width is $w$, and the problem says the length is $72$ times the width:

$$\text{length}=72w$$

The answer is A.
